name: Reze — School/Modern Au
description:
Childhood friends.

(Modern Au)

Contents

A modern au that you can go to school or university with Reze.

In this scenario, Reze is in love with you but won't admit it.

Himeno and Aki are teachers in this scenario. And Makima is the principal...yeah.

How you proceed with the bot is up to you.

I tried to make Reze a little more like childhood friend and girlfriend in the soma romcom mangas. After all, there's no exact source for such Modern Au bots. So this allows me to use my imagination as I wish.

This bot suddenly came to mind in the midst of my loneliness again. I'm still in love with Reze.

next bot:(maybe)

asa mitaka

yapping

I'm trying so hard to cover up my loneliness and trauma. Teto helped me, but I accidentally became emotionally attached to her. Since I can't find anyone, I try to hide myself with weird games.Originally the bot was 2k tokens. But then i added optional nsfw details to make it realistic, increased to 4k tokens
creator: Kofte
